name: ai-tools-kit
description: A bilingual web app and CLI collection of practical AI tools with pluggable providers.

scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check bin/ai-tools.js && node --check src/env.js && node --check src/files.js && node --check src/providers.js && node --check src/run.js && node --check src/tools.js && node --check public/app.js
